Entries.Name: Goth Kweebec
Entries.Line: What really sucks is that Kweebdrasil itself is fine with it. It's even helping me nurture my garden -- it straight up told me that it loves the challenge of growing 'our wacky cousins', as it put it.

Entries.Name: Goth Kweebec
Entries.Line: But according to the Council, I'm 'stressing it out'. Even though Kweebdrasil can and has tried to speak for itself.

Entries.Name: Goth Kweebec
Entries.Line: Like, you have to be a special kind of entitled if you think that your fifty-year-old stump can speak for an Ancient two hundred times your age. Hello?!

Entries.Name: Goth Kweebec
Entries.Line: And now, every so often, one of them comes over here to ask questions -- very loaded ones -- about whether I'm ashamed about 'rotting my home from inside out'.

Entries.Name: Goth Kweebec
Entries.Line: If you didn't shove your anthers so far down your style--

Entries.Name: Narrator
Entries.Line: Eyes closed, she takes a deep breath. Next time that they open, you can see that the act hasn't achieved much.

Entries.Name: Goth Kweebec
Entries.Line: I'm sorry, I've been antsy all day. Come see me tomorrow if you want to chat.
